rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Service Control Manager Spawning Command Shell (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Service Control Manager Spawning Command Shell (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: 80f850be-12ea-4bb8-b000-6e485dc821f5
status: experimental
description: "Detects suspect command line strings in CMD processes spawned by services.exe.\
  \ \nPart of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \services.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash:
    - echo
    - /c
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
